since_last: 22% of 85 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.02%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 22% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.48% · BTC -1.15% · Gold +0.75% · Nasdaq100 -1.73%. 22% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.02%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.02%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.73%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MGNI is the standout at +11.37%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +11.37%, INOD +8.44%, TLN +4.83%, SPCX +3.66%, EQIX +2.88%. Laggards: SNAP -9.46%, MRVL -8.64%, INTC -8.17%, KLAC -7.25%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.66% at $199.54
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.66% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
